steps.title: Turn the rate into table rows
steps.content: Juan rides at $5.7$ minutes per mile. That means $0$ miles takes $0$ minutes, $1$ mile takes $5.7$ minutes, and $2$ miles takes $11.4$ minutes. Enter those points in Desmos as a table.

steps.title: Fit the line
steps.content: Run $y_1\sim m x_1+b$. Desmos gives $m=5.7$ and $b=0$, so the function is $$m(x)=5.7x.$$ The coefficient $5.7$ is the number of minutes per mile.

steps.title: Choose the matching function
steps.content: Choice D, $m(x)=5.7x$, matches the regression and the units: minutes per mile times miles equals minutes. Choices A, B, and C use division, addition, or subtraction instead of multiplying by the rate. Choice D is correct.
